# olegmassage.com — Mobile Massage Service, Zürich Region, Switzerland

> Oleh Kryvorotko (Oleg) is a professional mobile massage therapist based in the Zürich Lake region, Switzerland. Former Olympic gymnast for Ukraine and circus artist. Winner of 1st Place at the 5th Swiss Massage Championship 2026 in the Swedish Massage category.

## Services

- **Swedish Massage** — 60 min 120 CHF, 90 min 160 CHF. Award-winning technique (1st Place SMC 2026). Deep relaxation, recovery, and body harmonization.
- **Classical Massage** — 60 min 100 CHF, 90 min 150 CHF. Relieves tension, improves circulation, restores energy.
- **Sports Massage** — 60 min 140 CHF. For athletes and active people. Muscle recovery, flexibility, injury prevention.
- **Anti-Cellulite Massage** — 45 min 100 CHF. Activates metabolism, improves lymph flow, firms skin.
- **Pregnancy Massage** — 60 min 120 CHF. Gentle and safe from 2nd trimester. Relieves back pain, reduces swelling.
- **Children's Massage** — 60 min 100 CHF. Playful and gentle. Supports development, improves sleep.
- **Cupping Therapy** — 15 min 30 CHF. Can be added to any massage. Relieves muscle tension, promotes circulation.
- **Relaxation Massage** — 60 min 120 CHF, 90 min 160 CHF. Stress relief, mental calm, complete relaxation.

## How It Works

Oleg comes to your home with a professional massage table and all necessary equipment. No need to travel — relax in your own environment.

## Service Areas

Zürich (all districts), Meilen, Horgen, Küsnacht, Thalwil, Wädenswil, Stäfa, Kilchberg, Zollikon, Erlenbach, Rüschlikon, Adliswil, Herrliberg, Schwyz, Luzern, Zug, Aargau, Rapperswil-Jona.

## Credentials

- 1st Place — Swiss Massage Championship 2026 (Swedish Massage)
- Certificate of Participation — Swiss Massage Championship 2026
- Workshops Day with Judges of SMC 2026 — Swiss Academy Massage & Aesthetics
- Classic Massage with Anatomy and Physiology — PROFMED (70 hours)
- Anatomy and Physiology — PROFMED (26 hours)
- Former Olympic Gymnast — Ukrainian National Team
